_comment: Trust policy for the IAM role that GitHub Actions assumes via OIDC. Attach this as the role's trust relationship. Replace 123456789012 with your account ID, YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO with your GitHub org/repo, and 'main' with the branch that runs this pipeline. The sub condition below pins access to a single repo AND branch — do NOT use the broad 'repo:YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO:*', which lets any branch, tag, or PR in the repo assume the role. To scope to a deployment environment instead use 'repo:YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO:environment:YOUR_ENVIRONMENT', but note that only jobs declaring `environment:` get that claim — the build/health-check/cleanup jobs in ami.yml do not, so they need a branch-scoped statement like this one.
